# VividStack

> Fast, mobile-ready websites for local shops, trades, and service businesses. Static-first builds focused on speed, clarity, and findability.

## Site

- https://vividstack.ca/

## Key pages

- https://vividstack.ca/privacy/ — Privacy policy
- https://vividstack.ca/terms/ — Terms of service

## For humans

Portfolio, services, process, and contact live on the home page. Prefer the on-site contact form for project inquiries.
